fields_json: {"title":"Home","slug":"home","body":"Handmade furniture built in Raleigh, NC. Tables, benches, and cabinets in solid hardwood.","heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-shop-hero"}},"published":false}
{"title":"About","slug":"about","body":"Carpenter by trade, building furniture on the side. Everything here is one piece at a time, hand-finished.","published":false}

{"title":"Contact","slug":"contact","body":"Send a note about a commission and I'll get back to you.","published":false}
